summary: Soundboard recording with clear sound and great harmonies, but it starts mid‑set and omits the early part of the concert.
review: The recording is praised for its clean sound quality and tight vocal harmonies, sourced from a soundboard. However, listeners note that the tape begins with the 15th song (the last track of the first set) and then runs straight into a 15‑song second set, making the concert incomplete.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive comments on sound quality and performance are offset by the missing first‑set material; with only one review, confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced sound noted as 'Good Sound', but the recording starts mid‑show (15th song) and therefore lacks completeness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The tape begins with the last song of the first set (PITB, ~16 min) and then runs a full 15‑song second set; missing earlier material disrupts the overall flow.
